case_title: UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A PARTNERSHIP DOING VS. RONEL F. CARIAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A PARTNERSHIP DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA SERVED JAN-21-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARIAN, RONEL F. AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-14-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-28-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A PARTNERSHIP DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARIAN, RONEL F.
